Download Havezic app

Our best Deals are in the App

Discover tours, hotel, flight and rental car deals exclusively in the app. Download today to stay connected with important trip details.
  • Get flight alerts and updates for your trips
  • Change or cancel your flights on the go!
  • Get exclusive ofers and prices

Scan the QR code to download the app

Flexible Bookings

That’s why we offer free cancellation on most hotels & rental cars.

No Flight? No Problem

Bundle hotel & rental car deals to build your perfect getaway.

Incredible Deals

Check out with confidence. Priceline members always get our best price.
